testcase.name: formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Recent (< 1 hour) > should return "just now" for timestamps less than 1 minute ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Recent (< 1 hour) > should return "just now" for current timestamp
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Recent (< 1 hour) > should return "1 min ago" for timestamps between 1-2 minutes ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Recent (< 1 hour) > should return "45 mins ago" for timestamps less than 1 hour ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Recent (< 1 hour) > should return "2 mins ago" for 2 minutes ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Hours > should return "1 hour ago" for timestamps between 1-2 hours ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Hours > should return "12 hours ago" for timestamps less than 24 hours ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Hours > should return "23 hours ago" for timestamps just under 24 hours
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Days > should return "yesterday" for exactly 1 day ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Days > should return "2 days ago" for 2 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Days > should return "6 days ago" for 6 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Weeks > should return "1 week ago" for 7-13 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Weeks > should return "1 week ago" for 10 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Weeks > should return "2 weeks ago" for 14 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Weeks > should return "3 weeks ago" for 21 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Months > should return "1 month ago" for 30-59 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Months > should return "1 month ago" for 45 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Months > should return "6 months ago" for 6 months ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Months > should return "11 months ago" for timestamps less than 12 months
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Years > should return "1 year ago" for exactly 365 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Basic Time Ranges - Years > should return "2 years ago" for 2 years ago
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Invalid Inputs > should return fallback message for null timestamp
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Invalid Inputs > should return fallback message for undefined timestamp
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Invalid Inputs > should return fallback message for invalid date string
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Invalid Inputs > should return fallback message for empty string
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Invalid Inputs > should return fallback message for negative timestamp
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Future Dates > should return "just now" for future dates (defensive)
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Future Dates > should return "just now" for slightly future timestamp
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Boundary Values > should return "1 min ago" for exactly 60 seconds ago
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Boundary Values > should return "yesterday" for exactly 24 hours ago
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Boundary Values > should return "1 week ago" for exactly 7 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Boundary Values > should return "1 month ago" for exactly 30 days ago
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Very Old Dates > should return "10 years ago" for 10 years ago
formatRelativeTime > Edge Cases - Very Old Dates > should return "25 years ago" for very old dates
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use singular "min" for 1 minute
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use plural "mins" for multiple minutes
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use singular "hour" for 1 hour
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use plural "hours" for multiple hours
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use singular "day" for 1 day (yesterday)
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use plural "days" for multiple days
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use singular "week" for 1 week
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use plural "weeks" for multiple weeks
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use singular "month" for 1 month
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use plural "months" for multiple months
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use singular "year" for 1 year
formatRelativeTime > Pluralization - Correct Grammar > should use plural "years" for multiple years
formatFullTimestamp > Standard Formatting > should format timestamp in standard format with month name
formatFullTimestamp > Standard Formatting > should include time with AM/PM format
formatFullTimestamp > Standard Formatting > should format with "at" separator between date and time
formatFullTimestamp > Different Times of Day > should format morning time with AM
formatFullTimestamp > Different Times of Day > should format afternoon time with PM
formatFullTimestamp > Different Times of Day > should format midnight correctly
formatFullTimestamp > Different Times of Day > should format noon correctly
formatFullTimestamp > Different Dates > should format dates from different months
formatFullTimestamp > Different Dates > should format dates from different years
formatFullTimestamp > Different Dates > should format dates with single-digit days correctly
formatFullTimestamp > Edge Case Handling > should return fallback message for null timestamp
formatFullTimestamp > Edge Case Handling > should return fallback message for undefined timestamp
formatFullTimestamp > Edge Case Handling > should return fallback message for invalid date string
formatFullTimestamp > Edge Case Handling > should return fallback message for empty string
